description_long: This is a classic red fire hydrant with a domed top and cylindrical body, featuring two large side outlets and a smaller front outlet, each capped and secured with metal chains. The hydrant is constructed from robust metal, with visible bolts around the base and at the top, indicating a heavy-duty, industrial design. The surface is painted red but shows signs of weathering and wear, with some areas appearing slightly faded or chipped. The chains attached to the caps are metallic and hang loosely, serving to prevent the caps from being lost when removed. The top of the hydrant has a prominent operating nut, used for opening the valve to release water. There are no visible manufacturer markings or logos on the exterior.
description: A weathered red metal fire hydrant with chained caps and a domed top, featuring three hose outlets and visible bolts.
description_view_0: Front view showing the central outlet with a chained cap and the domed top with an operating nut.
description_view_1: Angled side view highlighting one of the large side outlets and the attached chain, with the base bolts visible.
description_view_2: Rear view displaying both large side outlets and the cylindrical body, with chains hanging from both caps.
description_view_3: Opposite angled side view showing the other large outlet and its chain, as well as the domed top.
